page_metadata.biotools__summary: GTfold is a fast, scalable multicore code for predicting RNA secondary structure that is one to two orders of magnitude faster than the de facto standard programs and achieves comparable accuracy of prediction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GTfold is a fast, scalable multicore code for predicting RNA secondary structure that is one to two orders of magnitude faster than the de facto standard programs and achieves comparable accuracy of prediction.
